markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine the content collaboration workflow and align on competitor content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Workflow:** A label-based GitHub workflow will replace comments for tracking content status, providing clear visibility and preventing items from getting lost in the review cycle.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [**Editor Onboarding:** Gabby (GrowthX) will be onboarded to GitHub to directly edit PRs, enabling her to see the diff and streamline the revision process.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [**Competitor Content:** GrowthX will write long-form comparison articles. The initial strategy is to publish them as standalone pages, with a future pivot to a "hub-and-spoke" model possible.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [**AI Tuning:** Feedback on AI-generated redundancy is critical for GrowthX to tune its multi-agent pipeline and prevent "context window exhaustion," which causes repetitive outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=2214.0)

## Topics

### GitHub Workflow & Visibility

  - [**Problem:** The current comment-based review process is inefficient and lacks visibility, making it impossible to track content status.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
  - [**Solution:** A label-based workflow will be implemented to provide a consistent, at-a-glance status for each PR.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
      - [**Labels:** `first draft`, `needs revision`, `updated draft`, `ok to publish`.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This system is necessary for managing hundreds of articles and provides a dedicated status for the GrowthX collaboration, distinct from general marketing project statuses.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [**Blocker:** The GrowthX team (Suleiman) may lack the org-level permissions needed to add labels or move cards on the project board.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)

### Editor Onboarding & Process

  - [**Problem:** Edits are currently flagged to Suleiman (publisher), but Gabby (managing editor) is the correct person to make revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [**Solution:** Gabby will be onboarded to GitHub to enable direct PR edits.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Direct access to the diff is essential for efficient and accurate revisions.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [**Training:** Brock will create a Loom video to train Gabby on the GitHub UI, focusing on the Markdown preview feature.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)

### Competitor Content Strategy

  - [**Goal:** Synthesize internal battle cards into long-form comparison articles (1,200–1,500 words) for SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)
  - [**Initial Strategy: Standalone Articles**](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
      - [**Plan:** Publish each comparison (e.g., "Fleet vs. Jamf") as a single, unified page combining the existing visual grid with the new long-form text.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1846.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This avoids creating duplicate content and simplifies the initial implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [**Alternative Strategy: Hub-and-Spoke Model**](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
      - [**Plan:** Use long-form articles for SEO traffic, linking to separate, more visual comparison pages.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Allows for faster article updates and can drive higher conversion rates.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
      - [**SEO Concern:** Risk of cannibalizing traffic for the same keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1753.0)
  - [**Decision:** GrowthX will proceed with writing the long-form content. The final publishing strategy can be decided later, as the content itself is the primary asset.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)

### AI Pipeline & Content Quality

  - [**Problem:** The AI-generated drafts contain "AI-isms" like redundancy and repetitive phrasing, which may stem from "context window exhaustion."](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=2214.0)
      - [**Context Window Exhaustion:** A known LLM issue where long sessions cause the model to lose original context and produce repetitive, nonsensical, or hallucinated outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
  - [**GrowthX's Pipeline:** A multi-agent system designed to manage context by injecting specific artifacts (company context, personas) at each step.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=2075.0)
  - [**Feedback Loop:** Brock's edits on redundancy are critical feedback for GrowthX to tune its pipeline and writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=2265.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**John:**](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)
      - [Investigate GitHub permissions for the GrowthX team (Suleiman) to add labels and move cards.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
      - [Configure the new label-based workflow for GrowthX PRs.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [**Brock:**](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
      - [Share the latest competitor comparison matrix with Erik.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1187.0)
      - [Create a Loom video to train Gabby on the GitHub UI for PR editing.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
      - [Onboard Gabby to GitHub for PR editing.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
      - [Pause new article submissions next week (Dec 29–Jan 2); resume Jan 7.](https://fathom.video/share/jQcHkqSqxs6LMgso9v-Ms4jypsQhtwAM?tab=summary&timestamp=1983.0)
